name: 程度与比较
description: 用于表达程度、幅度、比较关系、差异化和随时间变化

expressions.note: 强调幅度大，适合实质差异而非统计显著性
expressions.example: Maternal employment increased substantially after the reform.

expressions.note: 强调变化明显可见，语气比 substantially 更鲜明
expressions.example: Completion rates differ markedly by parental income.

expressions.note: 较稳妥，强调不少但不一定极大
expressions.example: The gender gap narrows considerably after controls are added.

expressions.note: 强调很大程度上如此，适合解释性判断
expressions.example: The pattern is to a large extent driven by occupational sorting.

expressions.note: 常和 particularly/more 搭配，适合报告某组效应更强。
expressions.example: The pattern is more pronounced among mothers.

expressions.note: 强调幅度很小，常用于结果变化有限
expressions.example: The estimate increases marginally in the final model.

expressions.note: 最自然，适合一般性轻微变化描述
expressions.example: The coefficient is slightly larger among urban residents.

expressions.note: 强调有变化但不大，常用于效应大小
expressions.example: The reform modestly improved enrollment among low-income students.

expressions.note: 强调关系强度弱，适合避免夸大结果
expressions.example: Income is only weakly related to stated fertility intentions.

expressions.note: 强调明显对照，适合比较相反结果
expressions.example: By contrast, the rural sample shows little change.

expressions.note: 语气中性，适合一般比较但对照力度较弱
expressions.example: In comparison, men's employment trajectories are more stable.

expressions.note: 适合句内精确比较，常与基准组连用
expressions.example: Relative to graduates, non-graduates face higher unemployment risk.

expressions.note: 最通用，适合任何组间比较
expressions.example: Compared with natives, immigrants report lower job security.

expressions.note: 强调某模式更明显，适合异质性描述
expressions.example: The penalty is more pronounced than in earlier cohorts.

expressions.note: 直接比较数量或程度，适合结果报告
expressions.example: The wage gap is greater than the completion gap.

expressions.en: stronger for X than for Y
expressions.note: 适合比较关联强度或效应大小
expressions.example: The association is stronger for women than for men.

expressions.note: 强调增长速度超过，适合趋势比较
expressions.example: Housing costs outpace income growth among young adults.

expressions.note: 通用弱化表达，适合避免过度断言
expressions.example: The results are, to some extent, shaped by cohort composition.

expressions.note: 强调只是部分原因，适合机制解释
expressions.example: The gap is in part explained by occupational segregation.

expressions.note: 更简短，适合句中修饰动词或形容词
expressions.example: The decline is partly driven by delayed marriage.

expressions.note: 适合指出解释不完整，比 partly 更强调保留
expressions.example: The pattern is not entirely attributable to income differences.

expressions.note: 用于说明不平等形式不明显但仍存在，语气比 weak 更合适。
expressions.example: Inequality persists in subtle forms.

expressions.note: 强调某群体承担或获得的比例过高
expressions.example: Job loss disproportionately affects low-wage workers.

expressions.note: 强调在某群体中尤其明显，适合异质性结果
expressions.example: The decline is especially pronounced among rural women.

expressions.note: 强调现象集中在某群体，不一定涉及比例公平
expressions.example: Nonemployment is concentrated among workers without credentials.

expressions.note: 适合负担或风险，语气更形象
expressions.example: Care demands fall more heavily on women.

clusters.meaning: 一致地 vs 差异化地

expressions.note: 强调各组或各情境中表现一致
expressions.example: The association is uniformly positive across models.

expressions.note: 强调反复出现，适合模型和稳健性描述
expressions.example: The coefficient is consistently negative across specifications.

expressions.note: 强调变化或资源分布不均，适合不平等语境
expressions.example: The benefits of expansion were unevenly distributed.

expressions.note: 强调差异有规律地随某变量变化
expressions.example: Returns to education vary systematically by field of study.

expressions.note: 可修饰 understanding/relationship/forms，避免 over-simple。
expressions.example: The study provides a nuanced understanding of adoption.

clusters.meaning: 随时间变化的趋势描述

expressions.note: 最通用，适合一般时间变化描述
expressions.example: The gender gap narrowed over time.

expressions.note: 适合出生队列或毕业队列比较
expressions.example: Returns to college vary across cohorts.

expressions.note: 强调生命历程中的累积或变化
expressions.example: Health disadvantages accumulate over the life course.

expressions.note: 强调某事件之后的变化，适合政策或冲击
expressions.example: Fertility intentions changed in the wake of the recession.

expressions.note: 适合说明时间顺序和延迟影响，不等同于简单相关。
expressions.example: The two-year lagged effects remain significant.
